metadata.description: Random-init LeWM encoder across 10 seeds to test seed robustness of C6 anti-correlation.

sign_reversal.description: negative C_real_z vs C_real_state per-pair Spearman pairs

v1_favorable.description: V1-favorable D3xR0 and D3xR3 cells from Track A metadata

ordinary.description: Complement of invisible_quadrant, sign_reversal, latent_favorable, and v1_favorable

metadata.ordinary_definition: Complement of invisible_quadrant, sign_reversal, latent_favorable, and v1_favorable.
metadata.v1_favorable_source: Derived from Track A cell labels D3xR0 and D3xR3 in the latent artifact metadata.

tie_rules.pairwise_accuracy: Skip C_real_state ties; score tied control costs as 0.5 when C_real_state differs.
tie_rules.topk_and_false_elite: Ascending cost ranking with deterministic action_id tie-break.

metadata.topk_overlap_definition: |topk(control) intersection topk(reference)| / k, averaged over pairs.

pixel_preparation.note: Simulator replay and V1 validation were performed once before the random-seed encoding loop.
